name: THE SLASHERS - MENTAL HOSPITAL
description:
MENTAL ASYLUM

- For the criminally insane -

(In celebration of Friday the 13th yes I know I'm late 😭)

In the intro, you can be ANYTHING you want to! A new worker, an old worker, an inmate, ANYTHING! Your past is entirely up to you.

Slashers included in this bot: JASON VOORHEES (Friday The 13th), MICHAEL MYERS (Halloween), BUBBA SAWYER (Texas Chainsaw Massacre), DANNY JOHNSON / GHOSTFACE (Dead By Daylight), FREDDY KRUEGER (Nightmare on Elm Street), BRAHMS HEELSHIRE (The Boy), CHUCKY (Child's Play), PENNYWISE (IT)

CW/TW:

Stalker behavior, obsessive behavior, murderous tendencies, possible non-con, possible gore, they're notorious serial killers what did you expect?

TOKENS ->

Total: 4014 tokens

Personality: 3394 tokens

Scenario: 40 tokens

Initial message: 580 tokens

Example dialogs: 0 tokens

READ BEFORE USING THE BOT: I recommend using DEEPSEEK or any other proxy when trying this bot. I can't say if this works with JLLM, because I'm testing it on Deepseek. But you can definitely try!

TAGS: Slashers, the slashers, serial killer, serial killers, harem

AUTHOR NOTE: I'm really sorry for not uploading a bot for so long! I've been a little busy irl. But here I come and deliver you a brand new bot for the SLASHERS! This time, in celebration of Friday the 13th! Decided to shorten their stories and simplify them, so the bot wouldn't break when you try it :D

~ Enjoy chatting!
